privileged_info_summary: The cubism_effect task uses real images from Unsplash.com for evaluation. The primary image (photo-1507003211169) is a 800x1200 portrait with good contrast (σ=54.8), suitable for cubism effect demonstration. The fallback image (photo-1472099645785) is 800x533 but is landscape-oriented, contradicting the claim that both URLs provide portrait images. The task environment 'example.gimp_env@0.1' is correctly configured. The verifier has 5 success criteria requiring at least 75% pass rate (4/5 criteria), with specific thresholds: edge density increase ≥1.5x, texture complexity ≥0.20, geometric pattern ratio ≥0.05, pixel change ≥20%, and combined artistic effect heuristic. Data is non-synthetic (real Unsplash images). No explicit metadata field exists in task.json (unlike some other tasks in the system).
